---
title: "test_phase_89_verification.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/tests/test_phase_89_verification.py"
loc: 57
complexity: 1
logic_score: 6.42
style_score: 3.70
intel_score: 7.01
overall_score: 6.34
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating mock_db, test_heimdall_ward_broadcast_trigger. It exists to support broader Python integration routines. Its role in the system is to provide foundational utilities for script execution.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 6.4/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 7.0/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 0 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [json](file://json)
- [os](file://os)
- [sqlite3](file://sqlite3)
- [time](file://time)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [unittest.mock](file://unittest.mock)
- [pytest](file://pytest)
- [src.core.telemetry](file://src.core.telemetry)
- [src.cstar.core.rpc](file://src.cstar.core.rpc)
- [src.sentinel.wardens.mimir](file://src.sentinel.wardens.mimir)

### Exports
- `mock_db`
- `test_heimdall_ward_broadcast_trigger`
- `test_mimir_feedback_generation`
